label: Royal implant rule
description: Specifies which hediff implant a royal title holder may have, and the maximum permitted implant level.

implantHediff.label: Implant hediff
implantHediff.description: HediffDef representing the implant covered by this rule.

minTitle.label: Min title
minTitle.description: Minimum RoyalTitleDef required to be permitted this implant.

maxLevel.label: Max level
maxLevel.description: Maximum implant upgrade level permitted for this title tier.
